code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Payments=_ref=>{let{token}=_ref;const[payments,setPayments]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{const fetchPayments=async()=>{try{const res=await axios.get('/api/admin/payments',{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`}});setPayments(res.data);setLoading(false);}catch(err){setError('Failed to load payments');setLoading(false);}};fetchPayments();},[token]);if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading payments..."});if(error)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{color:'red'},children:error});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Payments"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{border:"1",cellPadding:"5",style:{borderCollapse:'collapse',width:'100%'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"User ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Loan ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Amount"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Type"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"M-Pesa Receipt"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Status"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Created"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:payments.map(p=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:p.id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:p.user_id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:p.loan_id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:p.amount}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:p.type}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:p.mpesa_receipt||'-'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:p.status}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:new Date(p.created_at).toLocaleString()})]},p.id))})]})]});};export default Payments;
